creator: wouter@fizzyflux.nl
text:
port [lang/perl5.10] LICENSE makevar contains two licences but LICENSE_COMB is not set. When you try to build you get an error.

Fix: 

Set makevar LICENSE_COMB to dual or multi in /usr/ports/lang/php5.10/Makefile. See /usr/ports/Mk/bsd.licenses.mk.

Workaround: remove LICENSE makevar from Makefile/
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/lang/php5.10
make
